password.description: User password  (min 8 char,must contain uppercase,lowercase, and num)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access token

identifier.description: Email address or username (email alias) associated with the account

token.description: Password reset token received via email

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 characters, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and number)

organizationId.description: ID of the organization to switch to

email.description: Email address of the person to invite

reportType.description: Type of compliance report to generate

startDate.description: Start date for the report period (ISO 8601 format)

endDate.description: End date for the report period (ISO 8601 format)

digestMode.description: Enable digest mode to batch notifications

minSeverity.description: Minimum severity level to trigger notifications

notes.description: Optional notes when acknowledging the alert

resolutionNotes.description: Notes explaining how the alert was resolved

pat.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with required scopes (repo, read:org, admin:repo_hook)

backfill.description: Whether to backfill commits from the last 90 days

webhookSecret.description: New webhook secret for GitHub webhook signature validation

enabled.description: Whether webhook processing should be enabled for this repository

repositoryId.description: Repository ID to test webhook connectivity

requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum number of webhook requests allowed per minute

enabled.description: Whether rate limiting is enabled for the organization
